_purpose: This file defines the final JSON message sent from the listener to the local game application.
_important: templates.json decides the output JSON structure.
The actual values come from the real TikTok event and from the matched XML rule.
Your game receives this generated JSON locally through stdout, UDP, or another configured transport.

rule._description: Information coming from the matched XML rule.

event._description: General information from the normalized TikTok event.

user._description: TikTok user who triggered the event, when available.

payload._description: Raw useful data extracted from the TikTok event payload.
